app.title: Crimson Desert Ultimate Mods Manager v{version}
app.subtitle: Crimson Desert Ultimate Mods Manager  v{version}
bug_page.title: Bug Report
bug_page.subtitle: Describe the issue, then Copy or Save the report and paste it into your NexusMods bug thread or GitHub issue. The report includes system info, mod state, and recent logs — but no personal data.
action_bar.fix_everything_tooltip: Revert, clear backups, rescan, reimport. Fixes most issues.
setup.instruction: Select your Crimson Desert installation folder:
setup.placeholder: Steam or Xbox Game Pass install folder
setup.invalid_path: bin64/CrimsonDesert.exe not found at this path.
import.drop_label:
Drop a mod to install or update  •  Drop an update to replace existing
zip, folder, .json, .bat, .py  •  Right-click mods for more options
mod_list.hint: Right-click a mod for more options  ·  Drag rows to reorder  ·  Ctrl+click to multi-select
asi.title: ASI Plugins
asi.update_dialog_title: Update {name} — Select folder containing the new .asi
asi.no_asi_found_body: No .asi files found in that folder.
activity.title: Activity Log
about.title: Crimson Desert Ultimate Mods Manager
about.update_available:
⚠  Update available: {tag}
Click the red banner at the bottom to open GitHub.
dialog.game_scan_needed_body:
Before using the mod manager, your game files need to be scanned.

For best results, please verify your game files through Steam first:
  Steam → Right-click Crimson Desert → Properties
  → Installed Files → Verify integrity of game files

Have you verified (or is this a fresh install)?
dialog.game_files_changed_body:
Your game files have changed since the last snapshot.

This usually means you verified through Steam.

Rescan now to update the snapshot?
dialog.fix_game_state_body:
This will revert all game files, clear old backups,
remove orphan directories, and reimport your mods.

If you verified game files through Steam first,
a fresh snapshot will also be taken.

Did you verify through Steam?
dialog.old_data_body:
Found leftover data from an older CDUMM version in:
{path}
({size_mb} MB)

Since v1.7.0, all mod data is stored in the CDMods folder
inside your game directory. This old data is no longer needed.

Delete it to free up space?
dialog.mods_need_reimport_body:
These mods were imported on an older version and don't have
stored source files. They can't be auto-updated or reconfigured.

{names}

To fix this, remove each mod and drag the original download
file back in. You only need to do this once per mod.
dialog.game_location_warning_body:
Your game is installed under Program Files, which has
restricted write permissions on Windows.

This can cause issues with mod backups and configuration.
If you experience problems, consider moving your Steam
library to a different location (e.g. C:\SteamLibrary).

Steam → Settings → Storage → Add a new library folder
dialog.vanilla_backup_incomplete_body:
{count} PAMT file(s) are currently modded and have no full vanilla backup:

{files}

To fix this:
1. Steam → Right-click Crimson Desert → Properties
   → Installed Files → Verify integrity of game files
2. Restart CDUMM — it will create the missing backups

Until then, Revert to Vanilla may not fully restore these files.
dialog.one_time_reset_body:
This update includes important fixes to how mods are stored.

Before continuing, please verify your game files through Steam:

  Steam → Right-click Crimson Desert → Properties
  → Installed Files → Verify integrity of game files

This ensures your game is in a clean state before re-scanning.
dialog.ready_to_continue_body: Have you verified your game files through Steam?
dialog.important_update_body:
This update fixes how vanilla backups are managed.

Your existing backups need to be rebuilt from scratch to
ensure Revert to Vanilla works correctly.

Please verify your game files through Steam first:

  Steam → Right-click Crimson Desert → Properties
  → Installed Files → Verify integrity of game files

Your mod list will be kept — you just need to re-apply them.
dialog.ready_to_continue_cleanup_body:
Have you verified your game files through Steam?

Click Yes to proceed with the cleanup.
Click No to do it later (the app will ask again next launch).
dialog.cleanup_complete_body:
Vanilla backups have been reset.

Your mods are still listed but disabled.
Enable them and click Apply to rebuild everything cleanly.
dialog.game_update_detected_body:
Crimson Desert has been updated{build_info}.

The app will now reset and re-scan your game files. After that, just re-import your mods.

Note: Game updates (including hotfixes) can break mods. If a mod stops working, it may need to be updated by its author for the new game version.
dialog.mods_need_reimport_old_body:
The following mods were imported by an older version and may crash the game:

{names}

They need to be uninstalled and re-imported to work correctly.

Uninstall them now?
dialog.first_run_body:
No vanilla snapshot exists yet. A snapshot is required before you can import mods.

This will scan all game files and may take a few minutes.

Create snapshot now?
dialog.mod_already_installed_body:
'{name}' is already installed.

Do you want to update it with the new version?
dialog.choose_variant_body:
This mod has {count} variants.
Choose which one to install:
dialog.script_mod_name_body: Enter a name for this mod:
dialog.revert_body:
This will restore all game files to their original state.
All applied mod changes will be removed.

Continue?
dialog.mod_name_mismatch_body:
The dropped mod is "{dropped_name}" but you're updating "{existing_name}".

Are you sure this is the right mod?
dialog.rescan_body:
This will create a new vanilla snapshot from your current game files.

Have you verified your game files through Steam?

  Steam → Right-click Crimson Desert → Properties
  → Installed Files → Verify integrity of game files

Only rescan after Steam verify — otherwise the snapshot
may capture modded files as 'vanilla'.
dialog.game_is_running_body:
Crimson Desert is currently running.

Please close the game before applying mods.
dialog.leftover_backups_body:
Found {count} backup file(s) ({size_mb} MB) in your
game directory:

{names}

These were created by individual mod scripts (not by CDUMM).
CDUMM has its own backup system and does not use these files.
They are just taking up disk space.

Delete them?
dialog.cannot_configure_no_options: No configurable options found in this mod.
dialog.invalid_directory_body:
This doesn't look like a Crimson Desert installation.
Expected to find meta/0.papgt in the selected folder.
dialog.find_problem_mod_min_mods: You need at least 2 enabled mods to run this tool.
dialog.mod_check_no_issues: No issues found. All mods look good.
dialog.no_snapshot_body: No snapshot exists yet. Scan game files first.
dialog.verify_error: Database or game directory not configured.
dialog.ready_with_mods_body:
Game files scanned ({count} files).

You have {mod_count} mod(s) that need re-importing:

{names}

Drop each mod onto the app to re-import it.
dialog.ready_no_mods_body:
Game files scanned ({count} files).

You can now import mods by dropping them onto the app.
dialog.cdumm_updated_body:
CDUMM was updated and the internal mod format has changed.

Your {count} mod(s) need to be reimported to work correctly
with the new version. This will revert to vanilla and reimport
all mods automatically. Your mod list and settings are preserved.

Reimport now? (Recommended)
dialog.critical_update_body:
You are running v{version} which has known issues that can break your game.

Version {tag} fixes these problems.

Click OK to open the GitHub releases page and download the latest version.
dialog.previous_crash_body:
It looks like the app didn't close normally last time.
This could indicate a bug.

Would you like to generate a bug report?
(You can attach it to a Nexus Mods bug report)
dialog.cancel_search_body: Cancel the search and restore your original mod configuration?
dialog.import_list_no_mods: No mods found in the file.
status.verify_game_files: Please verify game files (Steam: Verify Integrity / Xbox: Repair), then restart.
status.fix_progress: Fix in progress: rescanning game files...
status.fix_done_no_rescan: Fix done. Rescan skipped — verify through Steam and Rescan Game Files when ready.
status.cleaned_old_data: Cleaned up {size_mb} MB of old data.
status.import_error_db: Error: Database or game directory not configured.
status.import_no_snapshot: Game files not scanned yet. Go to Tools → Rescan Game Files first.
status.imported: Imported: {name} ({files} files). Click Apply when ready.
status.imported_script: Imported: {name} ({files} files). Enable it and click Apply when ready.
status.import_cancelled_health: Import cancelled due to health issues.
status.asi_loader_missing_warning: Warning: ASI Loader (winmm.dll) not found in bin64/. ASI mods won't load without it.
status.asi_no_files: No ASI files found to install.
status.game_exe_not_found: Game executable not found in bin64/
status.uninstalling: Uninstalling {count} mod(s) — Apply needed to revert files...
status.apply_reminder: Mod list changed — click Apply to update game files.
status.snapshot_complete: Snapshot complete: {count} files indexed. You can now import mods.
status.version_mismatch_warning: Warning: {count} mod(s) imported for a different game version: {names}...
status.reverting_for_cleanup: Reverting to vanilla to clean up...
status.script_running: Running {name} — complete the script in its window. The mod manager will capture changes when it finishes.
status.script_mods_must_reimport: Script mods must be re-imported. Remove the old version and import the new one.
status.disabled_problematic: Disabled {count} problematic mod(s). Click Apply to revert their changes.
status.migrated_with_failures: Migrated {count} mod(s) to new format. {failed} mod(s) need manual re-import.
status.auto_reimported_with_failures: Auto-reimported {count} mod(s) after game update. {failed} mod(s) need manual re-import.
health_check.critical_crash: — this mod will likely crash the game.
profile.load_dialog_body:
Load profile '{name}'?

This will change which mods are enabled/disabled.
verify.no_snapshot: No snapshot found. Scan game files first.
verify.all_clean_summary: All {count} game files match vanilla. Your game is clean.
verify.modded_summary: {modded} modded, {missing} missing, {extra} extra directories. {vanilla}/{total} files are vanilla.
preset.header:
This mod has multiple presets.
Choose which one to install:
toggle.check_items: Check the items you want to apply:
binary_search.intro_body:
This will test your {count} enabled mods using the Delta Debugging
algorithm to find the minimal set causing the crash.

It finds single bad mods, conflict pairs, and multi-mod issues.

Estimated: {best}-{worst} rounds (each round you launch the
game and report if it crashed).

Your mod configuration will be restored when finished.
binary_search.test_status: These mods are enabled for this test:
binary_search.all_mods_work: All enabled mods appear to work together.
binary_search.problem_single:
This mod causes the crash by itself.
Found in {rounds} rounds.
binary_search.problem_set_detail:
These mods crash when used together:
  {names}

Each works alone, but the combination crashes.
Found in {rounds} rounds.
bug_report.crash_intro: The app didn't close normally last time. Please describe what you were doing when it happened, then copy or save this report.
bug_report.normal_intro:
Describe the problem below, then copy or save the report.
Attach it to your Nexus Mods bug report page.
bug_report.placeholder: Example: I dropped a zip file, the progress bar reached 68%, then the app froze...
bug_report.header: CRIMSON DESERT ULTIMATE MODS MANAGER — BUG REPORT
changelog.header: CDUMM has been updated to v{version}
update_overlay.sub_text: Drop a folder or zip here  —  Press Escape to cancel
update_banner.text: ⚠  Update available: {tag} — click here to open GitHub
import_dialog.title: Import Mod
export_dialog.title: Export Mod List
import_list_dialog.title: Import Mod List
change_dir_dialog.title: Select Crimson Desert Game Directory
worker.no_changes_error:
No new changes detected. This mod may already be applied.

To install it fresh:
1. Click 'Revert to Vanilla' to restore original game files
2. Then re-import all your mods through the app
tools.language_restart_body: Language changed. Please restart CDUMM for the change to take effect.
import.drop_hint:
Drop a mod to install or update  •  Drop an update to replace existing
zip, folder, .json, .bat, .py  •  Right-click mods for more options
mod_list.title_tooltip: Load order: the mod at the top of the list (#1) wins conflicts against any mod below it. Drag rows or use the arrows in the Conflicts dialog to reorder.
settings.title: Settings
settings.export_list_desc: Share your mod list as a JSON file
settings.import_list_desc: Load a shared mod list from file
about.tagline: A mod manager for Crimson Desert. Import, organize, and apply PAZ data mods with conflict detection and safe vanilla backups.
about.github_desc: Source code, releases, and issue tracker.
about.bug_desc: Found a problem? Open an issue on GitHub.
about.license_desc: This software is free and open source. You may redistribute and/or modify it under the terms of the GPLv3 as published by the Free Software Foundation.
about.credits_detail: Built with PySide6 and QFluentWidgets. German translation by HaZt.
action_bar.revert_vanilla_tooltip: Restore all game files to their original unmodded state
tools.another_running: Another tool is already running. Please wait.
tools.verify.title: Verify Game State
tools.verify.desc: Check which game files are modded, vanilla, or unexpected. Shows a detailed breakdown of file integrity.
tools.verify.no_snapshot: No snapshot exists. Scan game files first.
tools.verify.no_mods_detected: Your game is completely clean -- no modifications detected.
tools.verify.all_match_snapshot: All these files match the snapshot.
tools.check.title: Mods Health Check
tools.check.desc: Run deep validation on all enabled mods. Detects broken deltas, missing files, PAMT mismatches, and other problems.
tools.check.not_configured: Game directory or database not configured.
tools.check.disabled_mods: Disabled {count} problematic mod(s). Re-apply to update game.
tools.culprit.title: Find Culprit Mod
tools.culprit.desc: Automatically launches the game through Steam, monitors for crashes, and uses binary search to identify which mod(s) cause problems. Requires at least 2 enabled mods. Do not interact with the game during testing.
tools.culprit.stopping_wait: Stopping... waiting for worker to exit.
tools.culprit.need_two_mods: Need at least 2 enabled mods to run bisection.
tools.culprit.all_compatible: All mods appear compatible. No crash detected.
tools.culprit.found_single: Found in {rounds} rounds. This mod has been disabled. Other mods have been restored.
tools.culprit.found_set:
{names}

All culprits disabled. Other mods restored. Found in {rounds} rounds.
tools.inspect.title: Inspect Mod
tools.inspect.desc: Validate a mod archive (.zip) before importing it. Checks file structure, PAZ targets, and potential conflicts with installed mods.
tools.inspect.drop_hint: Drop a mod or click Select File to analyze it
tools.inspect.not_available: Game directory or snapshot not available.
tools.fix.title: Fix Everything
tools.fix.desc:
One-click repair: reverts all game files to vanilla, clears old backups, removes orphan directories. If you verified through Steam first, a fresh snapshot will also be taken.

Use this when your game state is corrupted or after verifying game files through Steam.
tools.fix.not_configured: Game directory or database not configured.
tools.fix.step1: Step 1/3: Reverting game files to vanilla...
tools.fix.step3: Step 3/3: Clearing old backups and preparing rescan...
tools.fix.revert_complete_desc: All game files reverted to vanilla.
tools.fix.backups_cleared_desc: Old vanilla backups removed. A fresh scan will be taken.
tools.rescan.title: Rescan Game Files
tools.rescan.desc: Create a fresh vanilla snapshot from current game files. Run this after verifying game files through Steam.
tools.rescan.requested_desc: The snapshot refresh has been initiated. This may take a moment depending on game file sizes.
tools.rescan.enable_hint: Check the box above to enable
settings.language_applied_body: The interface language has been updated.
mod_list.double_override_warning: Both mods declare override — check priority
import.mixed_result: Installed {paz_count} mod file(s) and {asi_count} ASI plugin(s)
wizard.change_later: You can always change this later in Settings
wizard.theme_hint: Light for day raids, Dark for night sessions
wizard.not_found: Could not find the game automatically.
wizard.pick_manually: Please select your Crimson Desert folder below
asi.no_plugins: No ASI plugins found. Drop .asi files into the game's bin64 directory.
asi.delete_folder_confirm: Delete this folder? All plugins in it will be moved to Ungrouped.
asi.uninstall_confirm: Remove {count} selected plugins? This cannot be undone.
drop.title: Drop
drop.subtitle: Drop mods here to import
drop.formats: ZIP, folder, JSON patch, or any mod format
mods.drop_hint: or drop directly onto the window from any page
mods.uninstall_confirm: Remove {count} selected mods? This cannot be undone.
main.verify_hint: Click OK if you've verified, or if this is a fresh install.
main.not_ready_msg: Database or game directory not configured.
main.no_snapshot_msg: Game files not scanned yet. Go to Rescan Game Files first.
main.no_asi_loader: winmm.dll not found in bin64/. ASI mods won't load without it.
main.no_asi_files_msg: No .asi files found in this archive.
main.busy_msg: Another operation is in progress. Please wait.
main.reverted: All game files restored to their original state.
main.busy_wait: Please wait for the current operation to finish.
main.mod_removed: Mod removed and game files reverted.
main.apply_success: All mod changes applied and verified successfully.
main.no_mods_in_file: No mods found in the file.
main.copy_report: Copy this report when filing a bug on NexusMods or GitHub.
bug.title: Bug Report
bug.placeholder: Example: I dropped a zip file, the progress bar reached 68%, then the app froze...
bug.upload_ok:
PrivateBin URL copied to clipboard.
Opening GitHub issues — paste the URL in your new bug report.
bug.upload_failed:
Upload failed — copied raw text instead.
{error}
bug.privacy_body:
The report is encrypted in this app using AES-256-GCM before it leaves your machine. The server cannot read its contents.

The decryption key is the part of the URL after the '#'. Anyone with that full URL can read the report, so only share it where you would share the raw report itself.

Windows usernames in paths are replaced with 'USER' before upload.

Paste expires automatically based on your Settings (default: 1 week).
changelog.updated: CDUMM has been updated to v{version}
preset.choose_desc: This mod has multiple presets. Check ALL you want installed — ticked presets get bundled into a single mod you can toggle individually later.
preset.check_items: Check the items you want to apply:
patch.no_mount_time:
This mod does not use mount-time patching.
Per-patch toggle is only available for JSON mods imported with v2.5+.
Reimport the mod to enable this feature.
patch.unsaved_msg: You have unsaved patch toggle changes. Save before closing?
profile.title: Mod Profiles
profile.load_msg:
Load profile '{name}'?

This will change which mods are enabled/disabled.
setup.title: Game Directory Setup
setup.select: Select your Crimson Desert installation folder:
setup.invalid: bin64/CrimsonDesert.exe not found at this path.
settings.privatebin_hint: When you click 'Submit Bug Report' on the Bug Report page, the report is end-to-end encrypted and uploaded to this PrivateBin instance, then the GitHub issues page opens. The decryption key stays in the URL fragment — the server never sees your data.
tool.pp_desc_enabled: Fully automated — the game will auto-press Play at the title screen during each test round. No babysitting needed.
tool.pp_desc_disabled: Press Play is installed but currently disabled. Go to ASI Plugins and enable it to unlock fully automated mode.
tool.pp_desc_missing: To fully automate crash testing, install the Press Play ASI mod. It auto-presses Play at the title screen so each test round runs hands-free.
tool.quick_fix_desc:
Revert game files to vanilla, clean orphan directories.
Use when mods are broken but game files haven't changed.
tool.full_reset_desc:
Revert files, clear all backups, remove orphans,
then take a fresh snapshot. Use after verifying
game files through Steam.
about.enjoying_desc: This project is free and open source. If it saved you time, a small donation helps keep it going.
tooltip.update_available: Update available! Click to open NexusMods
infobar.cleaned_old_data: Cleaned up {size_mb} MB of old data.
infobar.snapshot_complete_msg: {count} game files indexed. You can now import mods.
nexus.invalid_url_body: Could not find a mod ID in that URL.
settings.invalid_dir_body:
This doesn't look like a Crimson Desert installation.
Expected to find bin64/CrimsonDesert.exe in the selected folder.
settings.nexus_all_up_to_date: All mods are up to date!
settings.nexus_key_row_desc: Your personal NexusMods key — testing only, never shared.
settings.privatebin_instance_row_desc: Server that receives the encrypted report.
settings.privatebin_expire_row_desc: Auto-deletes the report after this window.
conflicts.title: Conflicts
conflicts.hint: The mod at the TOP of the list (#1) wins conflicts. Use the up/down arrows below, or drag rows in the main mod list, to change the winner.
conflicts.empty_body: Every mod's changes compose cleanly at the current priority.
conflicts.load_order_hint: Higher rows win. Use the arrows to reorder.
conflicts.section_actionable_desc: These conflicts overlap. Load order decides the winner — use the arrows below to reorder.
conflicts.section_auto_desc: These mods touch the same archive but different parts. Both apply — no action needed.
conflicts.caption_mixed: Only the “Needs your attention” section reacts to load order. The rest compose automatically.
conflicts.caption_actionable_only: Load order decides the winner for these conflicts. Use the arrows below to change it.
conflicts.caption_auto_only: All conflicts resolve automatically. You don't need to do anything.
activity.msg_auto_fixed_dirty: Auto-fixed dirty game state on startup
activity.msg_reverted_vanilla: Reverted all game files to vanilla
activity.msg_verify_clean: Game state verified: ALL CLEAN ({count} files vanilla)
activity.msg_verify_modded: Game state verified: {modded} modded, {extra} extra dirs, {vanilla} vanilla
activity.msg_mod_check_passed: Mod check passed — no issues found
activity.msg_fix_everything: Fix Everything: reverted and cleaned up (no rescan)
activity.msg_fix_everything_rescan: Fix Everything: reverted, cleared backups, rescanning
